rationale: GTIN is the standard product identifier for DPP
Product Description provides direct coverage for DPP product name requirement
Brand Owner GLN provides direct manufacturer identification
Material Type attributes provide direct coverage for DPP material composition
Battery Type and Battery Capacity attributes provide direct coverage for DPP battery requirements
Energy Efficiency Class (EU energy label) covers energy consumption but not full lifecycle carbon footprint
Hazardous Material Indicator is boolean flag. ESRS E2-4 requires substance-level detail (CAS numbers, concentration, risk classification).
GS1 NL sector models have 107 packaging-related attributes providing direct coverage for material composition
Warranty Period is proxy for durability but not direct durability metric (e.g., expected product lifespan)
Disposal Instructions exist but may not cover full end-of-life circularity requirements (e.g., disassembly, material recovery)
Product Category can identify EUDR-scope commodities (cattle, cocoa, coffee, palm oil, rubber, soy, wood) but not structured for EUDR compliance
GS1 GLN (Global Location Number) provides direct supplier identification
FMCG sector includes Country of Origin attribute providing direct coverage
FMCG sector includes Fair Trade Indicator providing direct coverage
Official GS1 Netherlands mapping: ESRS E5 (Circular Economy) directly maps to GS1 Circular Economy Attributes for product lifecycle, repair, reuse, and recycling data exchange.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'carbonFootprintValue' (gs1:carbonFootprintValue) provides standardized carbon footprint measurement aligned with ESRS E1 climate disclosure requirements.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'greenhouseGasEmissionsValue' (gs1:greenhouseGasEmissionsValue) enables reporting of GHG emissions data required by ESRS E1.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'energyConsumptionValue' (gs1:energyConsumptionValue) supports ESRS E1 energy consumption disclosure requirements.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'renewableEnergyPercentage' (gs1:renewableEnergyPercentage) enables reporting of renewable energy usage aligned with ESRS E1.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'waterConsumptionValue' (gs1:waterConsumptionValue) supports ESRS E2 water consumption disclosure requirements.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'waterUsageValue' (gs1:waterUsageValue) enables reporting of water usage data aligned with ESRS E3.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'deforestationRiskLevel' (gs1:deforestationRiskLevel) supports ESRS E4 biodiversity and EUDR deforestation risk disclosure.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'landUseChangeIndicator' (gs1:landUseChangeIndicator) enables reporting of land use change data required by ESRS E4.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'recycledContentPercentage' (gs1:recycledContentPercentage) supports ESRS E5 recycled content disclosure requirements.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'recyclabilityIndicator' (gs1:recyclabilityIndicator) enables reporting of product recyclability aligned with ESRS E5.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'productDurabilityValue' (gs1:productDurabilityValue) supports ESRS E5 product durability disclosure requirements.
GS1 WebVoc attribute 'repairabilityScore' (gs1:repairabilityScore) enables reporting of product repairability aligned with ESRS E5 and DPP requirements.
